feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I've Been Watching You
entry.summary:
Author: adoringbuck

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,223Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Four months ago, a RTC left thirty two year old Harvey Billings a widower, his entire life torn into shreds.Eddie Diaz was at the scene, the last member of the 118 to have contact with Harvey's wife, and in his eyes, the reason for his wife's death. Months later, unbeknownst to Eddie and his loved ones, Harvey has been watching his every move, waiting until the time was right to strike. He'd learnt his weaknesses, and more importantly, who he holds dear. Harvey will stop at nothing until Eddie feels the same level of pain he has.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 180,949Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 188

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.summary:
Author: StarrySummers04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,951Chapters: 55/?Kudos: 1,000

entry.title: Been Waitin' All This TIme
entry.summary:
Author: CakeAnyoneAnyone28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,901Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: When Buck and Eddie head to Nashville for the Firefighter Games, Buck is focused on winning-but Eddie is distracted by feelings he’s been trying not to name for years. As the competition pushes them closer to the edge, an unexpected moment forces both of them to confront everything they’ve left unsaid.

entry.title: Sloppy Seconds
entry.summary:
Author: sinsiggy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,452Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 4

Summary: Something strange hums in Buck’s stomach and he can’t stop himself from blurting, “Who was that?” “Who was- oh, uh,” Eddie hesitates, “No one.” Buck raises an eyebrow as a very not-no-one buzz comes through again. “No one?” Eddie rolls his eyes without any real annoyance, “It’s just Alex.” Or After Buck hooks up with Alex, Eddie decides to fuck around. They both find out.

entry.title: know a few things but i still got a lot to learn
entry.summary:
Author: mmmikaela

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,544Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 140

Summary: Rubbing the back of his neck with a grimace as he walks past, Buck says, “So it took about ten minutes of conversation for me to put two-and-two together and realize that she was that kid Blue’s mom.” Eddie lets out a low whistle "With the way she was looking over I’m surprised she gave you more than five minutes without hinting that y’all should take things elsewhere.” Buck nods. “There was some very suggestive eye contact, but quick and dirty in a bathroom stall or the backseat of a car really isn’t my thing anymore. Besides, I’d rather hang out with you anyway.”Or, Eddie isn't alone for very long after leaving Buck at the bar in Nashville.

entry.title: i can't save us
entry.summary:
Author: purexheart

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,861Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Her parents had forced her to keep her life before Hershey a secret from her new friends. She couldn’t talk about Daniel or the day he died. And she couldn’t talk about the week after when her parents ripped Evan out of her life as well. At fifteen, Maddie started to form a plan to get out of town and try everything she can to track her brother down. At eighteen, she took off while her parents slept in a bed upstairs with no idea where to begin, just knowing she had to try. Or; The Buckley’s couldn’t stand being reminded of Daniel every time they stare back into Evan’s eyes. They put him up for adoption, move towns, and try to start again no matter how much pain that put their daughter through.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Everything is Romantic
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,380Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: "I thought it was a sweet gesture.""It was," Buck affirms. "A sweet gesture that made me really want to have sex with you.""Not a high bar. Most things make you want to have sex with me.""That's true," Buck agrees, sipping his margarita slowly and watching Eddie across the rim of the glass."For instance, now," Eddie goes on conversationally. "You're waiting for me to piss my pants so you can get off about it.""I'm pretty sure you're going to get off about it too."---Exactly what it says on the tin.

entry.title: One stupid mistake
entry.summary:
Author: EMBER_1248

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,887Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Across town, Buck’s phone buzzed next to him on the ground. The screen lit up the dark alley. Eddie ❤️ calling… Buck’s eyes fluttered open halfway. The buzzing sound scraped through the fog in his head. He could see light… hear something vibrating. His husband.

entry.title: We'll Be Alright
entry.summary:
Author: miladystark

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,366Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 90

Summary: “You’re alive,” Buck choked out. Eddie’s hands immediately cupped his face. “Buck—” “I thought you died,” Buck sobbed, shaking his head weakly. Eddie froze. Buck grabbed weakly at his shirt. “I thought you died and I didn’t get to—” His voice broke completely. Eddie pulled him closer instinctively. _____________________________________ This is like an alternate chapter to what their reunion could've been.

entry.title: dressed in clichés
entry.summary:
Author: helikesyou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,421Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 75

Summary: “I was never really good at the whole dating thing, and you,” Eddie smiled wryly, gesturing between Buck and the dance floor, “clearly are.”Buck’s face did something that Eddie couldn’t decipher, then shuttered. “Right. Of course. Well,” he smiled at Eddie, but it was weak at the edges and didn’t quite reach his eyes. “That’s what the practice is for.”“I’m not sure practice is gonna fix this, Buck. I don’t even know where to start.”“I’ll teach you,” Buck said easily, and then his eyes widened as if he’d realized the implication of what he’d offered.   or, buck teaches eddie how to flirt and the nashville trip leads to some revelations
